CustomField.formula: OR( ISPICKVAL( ProjectName__r.ProjectStatus__c , "Closed"), ISPICKVAL( Package__r.PackageStatus__c , "Closed"), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Package__r.PackageSuperior__c )), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.PackageSuperior__r.PackageStatus__c,"Closed") ), ExpenseValidatedFinance__c =true, ExpenseValidatedProjectResponsible__c =true )
CustomField.label: ValNoDelete
